text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheers ring out for Narita Brian as she defeats the
Assassin and wins the spring Tenno Sho. Rice
Shower, amidst the cheers for her foe, stands
proud despite the loss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, Narita Brian is moved by Rice
Shower's strength of heart and vows to get even
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to reach the top, Narita Brian focuses on
the first race of the Senior Autumn Triple
Crown—the autumn Tenno Sho.
